;<span id="Category">category</span>
:predecessor of [[Glossary:Concept|concept]]s in older SuperMemos. No longer used as of [https://super-memory.com/archive/help17/new.htm SuperMemo 17]. A '''category''' used to mean a named [[Glossary:Branch|branch]] of the [[Glossary:Knowledge_tree|knowledge tree]] to which [[Glossary:Element|element]]s belonging to a given class of knowledge were added. For example, you might have kept '''categories''' such as: ''General Knowledge'', ''Family'', ''Internet'', ''Job'', etc. Now you can accomplish the same with [[Glossary:Concept|concept]]s.
